title: Zudoku Plugin
description: Schema for a Zudoku plugin configuration. Plugins extend the platform with additional functionality such as search (Pagefind, Inkeep), analytics (Sentry), and custom pages.

name.description: Plugin name identifier, e.g. 'search-pagefind', 'sentry', or a custom plugin name.

config.description: Plugin-specific configuration options. Structure varies by plugin.
